title: EnderTracker
description: Visualize where your pearls and arrows trayectory! A helpful tool for learning and practicing projectile paths.
body:
# Ender Tracker
Visualize where your pearls and arrows will land! A helpful tool for learning and practicing projectile paths. **1.21.8+** (Fabric). 
## Features
- **Projectiles Supported**: Ender Pearls, Arrows, and Potions.
- **Own Tracking**: Preview your trajectory before throwing or firing.
- **Rival Tracking**: Automatically detect and track projectiles thrown by other players in the world.
- **Professional UI**: Fully customizable colors and toggles via **YetAnotherConfigLib** and **Mod Menu**.
## Configuration
Access the settings via the **Mod Menu** in-game. You can independently toggle:
- Trajectory lines for yourself and rivals.
- Landing point indicators for yourself and rivals.
- Custom RGBA colors for every projectile type.
## ⚠️ Competitive Play Warning
**IMPORTANT**: While this mod is a powerful utility tool, it provides predictive information (future landing points) that is not available in vanilla Minecraft.
> [!WARNING]
> Use this mod at your own risk on competitive multiplayer servers. Many servers (like Hypixel, etc.) may consider **Rival Tracking** or **Landing Indicators** as an unfair advantage or "Aim Assist." We strongly recommend checking the rules of the server you are playing on before using this mod in a multiplayer setting.
## Dependencies
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
- YetAnotherConfigLib (Required for configuration UI)
- Mod Menu (Optional, recommended for easy access to settings)
